name: Boswellia AKBA standardized
summary: Decision-ready summary: Boswellia AKBA standardized is best framed for osteoarthritis pain; joint function; inflammatory discomfort; safety screen: pregnancy caution; anticoagulants; GI irritation.
description: Boswellia AKBA standardized extracts are used for joint pain; evidence supports COX/5-LOX and inflammatory mediator downregulation.
safetyNotes: Short osteoarthritis trials of specific Boswellia extracts, including an AKBA-enriched product, did not show a clear excess of adverse events, but reporting and formulations varied. Pregnancy, breastfeeding, surgery, bleeding, liver, kidney, long-term use, and medication-specific interaction safety remain insufficient.
